title: Merge conflict handling
goal: Turn worker merge conflicts into structured blocked artifacts instead of rough errors.
acceptance: The affected slice is marked blocked with conflicted file details.
The integration worktree aborts the failed merge before cleanup.
must_ask_if: The slice requires changing the JSON-only worker result contract incompatibly.
The implementation would remove existing CLI/daemon commands.
Acceptance criteria conflict with the Khazad-Doom rule: You shall not slop.
